skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: Create AI-generated short videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content production
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 534 potential security issues across shell scripts and documentation. After manual review, all findings are false positives from legitimate functionality: shell command examples in documentation (SETUP-CHECKLIST.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md), standard API operations using curl/jq, config file access (~/.pexo/config) for credential storage, and network requests to official Pexo.ai endpoints. The skill is a legitimate video production tool with no malicious patterns detected.

medium_findings.title: Documentation Contains Shell Command Examples
medium_findings.description: SETUP-CHECKLIST.md and TROUBLESHOOTING.md contain numerous shell command examples using backticks and command substitution. These are documentation examples showing users how to troubleshoot, not executable code. No security risk.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Clear documentation pattern - files are Markdown references with code blocks, not executable scripts. Commands are instructional examples for users.

low_findings.title: Standard Shell Utilities for File Operations
low_findings.description: Scripts use standard shell commands (stat, basename, jq, curl) for legitimate file operations, JSON parsing, and HTTP requests. All commands use fixed arguments or validated user input. No command injection vectors detected.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard utility usage patterns - no user input directly injected without sanitization. File paths validated before use.

low_findings.title: Config File Access for API Credentials
low_findings.description: Script accesses ~/.pexo/config to read PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL. This is the standard Unix pattern for storing user credentials. Config file is sourced with proper error handling.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Legitimate credential storage pattern following Unix conventions. File is user-owned with proper permissions documentation.

low_findings.title: Network Requests to Official Pexo.ai Endpoints
low_findings.description: All hardcoded URLs point to official Pexo.ai services (pexo.ai, pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com). No third-party or suspicious endpoints detected. Network activity is for legitimate API communication.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs verified as official service endpoints. No data exfiltration patterns detected.

low_findings.title: MD5 Hash Usage for Non-Security Purpose
low_findings.description: One script uses MD5 hashing, but not for authentication or sensitive data. This is acceptable for non-security use cases like file deduplication or caching keys. No security impact.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: MD5 used in utility context, not for security/crypto purposes. Acceptable use case.

content.user_title: Create AI Short Videos for Social Media
content.value_statement: Generate professional short videos (5-120 seconds) for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and marketing campaigns. Simply describe your video concept, optionally upload reference images, and receive a production-ready video in 15-20 minutes.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for any platform
Upload and integrate reference images, videos, and audio files into your production
Create product advertisements, explainer videos, brand content, and social clips from text descriptions
Iterate on videos with revision requests using natural language feedback
Preview multiple video options and select your preferred version before final delivery
Track video production progress with real-time status updates and project links
limitations: Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex or extended content
Requires valid Pexo.ai API credentials and sufficient account credits to generate videos
Cannot crawl web URLs - you must provide local files for any reference materials
Maximum video length is 120 seconds; longer videos are not supported
Each message and revision consumes credits from your Pexo account balance

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creator
use_cases.description: Create engaging short videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Describe your concept, add product photos or branding elements, and receive platform-ready vertical videos.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Generate product showcase videos and advertisements. Upload product images, specify key features and target audience, and receive professional promotional videos ready for ad campaigns.

use_cases.title: Brand Storytelling
use_cases.description: Create explainer videos and brand stories. Provide your brand guidelines, describe the narrative, and receive polished videos that communicate your message effectively.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second vertical video about your topic for Instagram Reels
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick social content without custom assets

prompt_templates.title: Product Video with Reference Images
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a promotional video for your product. Upload product photos first, then describe what makes the product special and who should buy it.
prompt_templates.scenario: E-commerce or marketing with product images

prompt_templates.title: Revision and Refinement
prompt_templates.prompt: Continue improving the video by providing feedback like 'make it more energetic', 'add transitions between clips', or 'change the music style'
prompt_templates.scenario: Iterating on an initial video draft

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Aspect Ratio Production
prompt_templates.prompt: Create the same video concept in multiple formats: 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, and 1:1 for Instagram Feed

output_examples.input: Create a 15-second TikTok video about sustainable fashion tips. Use upbeat music and quick cuts.
output_examples.output: Agent generates the video, provides download link, and displays: Video ready! Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/123/assets/video.mp4?expires=... View project: https://pexo.ai/project/123

output_examples.input: Make a product video for my organic skincare line (uploads 3 product photos)
output_examples.output: Agent uploads photos, creates video showcasing products, delivers: Your product video is ready! Download at [full URL with signature]. Project: https://pexo.ai/project/456. Want any changes?

best_practices: Provide clear, specific descriptions of your video concept including target audience, tone, and key elements you want featured
Upload high-quality reference images, videos, or audio files to guide the AI and improve final output quality
Use the project link (https://pexo.ai/project/{id}) to monitor progress and access previous versions for comparison
Consolidate all instructions into a single message to avoid wasting credits on multiple submissions
anti_patterns: Do not add technical parameters like duration, aspect ratio, or model specifications unless specifically requested - let Pexo determine optimal settings
Avoid sending multiple separate messages with small changes - consolidate feedback into one revision request to save credits
Never share your API key or project URLs publicly, as video links contain temporary access signatures
Do not request videos longer than 120 seconds or outside supported aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)

faq.question: How long does video production take?
faq.answer: Short videos (15-30 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may require additional time. You will receive progress updates and can track status via your project link.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC. All files must be local - web URLs are not supported.

faq.question: Do I need a Pexo account?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a Pexo.ai account with API credentials. Video generation requires credits. Run pexo-doctor.sh when setting up to verify your configuration and check credit balance.

faq.question: Can I revise the video after generation?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project ID and send feedback messages like 'make it more dynamic' or 'focus more on the product'. Each revision uses your project's context and consumes credits.

faq.question: What happens if production fails?
faq.answer: The agent will provide error details from Pexo. Common issues include insufficient credits (add credits at pexo.ai/home) or unsupported file types. You can retry after addressing the issue.

faq.question: How do I download the final video?
faq.answer: The agent provides a full download URL with authentication parameters. Copy the entire URL including all query parameters. You can also access videos via your project page at pexo.ai/project/{id}.
